violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw chicken touching raw beef in the cold hold on the food prep line. In the walk in cooler raw chicken above raw beef.--Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a clean and sanitized container. -Raw meat in the refrigerator and walk in freezer stored in grocery bags not food grade.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Thawing frozen seafood in a bowl of water on the counter. Placed in sink with running water upon request.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
